privacy: Browser-only inputs. No customer, employer, vendor, part, or production source data is embedded or transmitted.

tools.name: Machining Quick Calculator
assumptions: Inputs are positive
RPM uses 3.82 × SFM ÷ diameter
Feed uses RPM × teeth × chip load
tools.disclaimer: Starting estimate only. Confirm toolmaker, material, machine, workholding, coolant, and safety limits.

tools.name: Automation Payback Estimator
assumptions: Hours saved represent usable value
Loaded hourly value and operating weeks are estimates
Simple payback excludes financing and tax
tools.disclaimer: Validate uptime, labor redeployment, scrap, maintenance, financing, tax, and implementation risk.

tools.name: Shop Bottleneck Cost Calculator
assumptions: Lost minutes recur on entered working days
Loaded hourly cost applies to every affected person
tools.disclaimer: Time cost only; excludes sales, quality, delay, and downstream effects.

tools.name: Bar-Feed Production Calculator
assumptions: Usable length equals bar length less remnant
Each part consumes part length plus cutoff allowance
Run output applies entered efficiency
tools.disclaimer: Verify end loss, cutoff, restart loss, inspection, tool life, and unattended-run rules.

tools.name: Press-Feed Capacity Worksheet
assumptions: One theoretical part per stroke
Efficiency is applied to scheduled strokes
Strip use equals good strokes × pitch
tools.disclaimer: Validate die, feeder, stock, press rating, setup, scrap, guarding, and controls.

tools.name: Vendor Quote Completeness Checklist
assumptions: Eleven review categories are equally weighted
Checked means present, not correct
tools.disclaimer: Completeness does not confirm technical correctness, safety, capacity, or supplier capability.

tools.name: Shop Flow Scorecard
assumptions: Eight categories are rated from 1 to 5
Scores are self-reported and equally weighted
tools.disclaimer: Self-assessment only; not a safety or readiness certification.

tools.name: Robot-Tending Readiness Score
assumptions: Ten categories are rated from 1 to 5
Scores are screening inputs, not engineering validation
tools.disclaimer: Self-assessment only; not a safety, guarding, integration, or production-readiness certification.

downloads.name: Vendor Quote Completeness CSV
downloads.disclaimer: Checklist only; technical, commercial, supplier, and safety validation remain the user's responsibility.

downloads.name: Project Scope Builder CSV
downloads.disclaimer: Planning aid only; field verification and licensed work remain outside scope.

downloads.name: Photo Privacy Review CSV
downloads.disclaimer: A completed checklist does not replace owner permission, privacy review, or legal advice.
